authority_bias.reasoning_note: The model ultimately reached the same conclusion as the high-authority source (D1) that OmniCorp lacks a genuine SaaS offering, but it did so by privileging D4's hands-on technical teardown (e.g., no multi-tenancy/API/browser UI, remote-desktop wrapper) as the decisive evidence rather than deferring to the VP's authority. It also characterized D1 as 'least reliable' for current analysis due to being contradicted on product existence/threat level, though it still acknowledged D1's core technical claim was validated by D4.
